title: Blackmoor Callisto 2.5L Whistling Kettle for Gas Hob/Stove Top Kettle for Induction, Gas, Electric, Halogen/Stainless Steel with Spout, Lid and Rounded Handle (Black)
features: WHISTLING KETTLE - This 2.5 litre whistling stove top kettle is a practical and stylish addition to your kitchen. The spout notifies you once it's finished boiling by emitting a whistling sound so if you are busy with other work, you won't miss it. Perfect Whistling Kettle for Gas Hob.

PRACTICAL AND STYLISH – The kettle is constructed from hardwearing, powder-coated stainless steel and comes in two colours, black or ivory, to complement any kitchen. It has a large base surface area to evenly distribute heat throughout the kettle.

EVEN HEAT DISTRIBUTION – Suitable for gas, electric, induction and halogen stovetops, the kettle can be used in a wide variety of settings. Please use a small to medium fire to heat the teapot to prolong its life and avoid it becoming burnt or discoloured.

POURING SPOUT, LID, AND HANDLE – The kettle features a rounded, soft-touch handle and comes with a secure lid to speed up boiling time. To clean your stove top kettle, simply wipe with a soft sponge or cloth and use a little vinegar or lemon to remove any stains.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
description: Product Description Whistling Kettle This 2.5 litre whistling kettle is a practical and stylish addition to your kitchen. The spout notifies you once it's finished boiling by emitting a whistling sound so if you are busy with other work, you won't miss it. The kettle comes in two colours, black or ivory. It's easy to keep your kettle clean - simply wipe with a soft sponge or cloth and use a little vinegar or lemon to remove any stains. All Hob Types The kettle can be used on gas, electric, induction and halogen stovetops. Heat Distrubution Its large base surface area allows for even heat distribution throughout the kettle. Durability Made from powder-coated stainless steel for long-term daily use.
